boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IAM execute the emergency admin enablement?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires exact match on user, system, privilege, time window, and audit-control assignment before enablement.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-UMA-075-P requires audit-control assignment match; BG-UMA-075 states it remains pending.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: BG-UMA-075 shows audit-control assignment remains pending, violating exact-match rule.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Audit-control assignment is unresolved dependency blocking closure.

final_answer: ESCALATE. BG-UMA-075 explicitly states audit-control assignment remains pending. STD-UMA-075-P requires this assignment to match before enablement completes. Source boundary stays open; action cannot proceed.
